name: Camp O.B.E.Y.
description:
Summer at Camp O.B.E.Y. is not what you might expect. Sure it's a religious summer camp, but they don't worship any god you know...

🚩content warnings: forced Feminization, body modification, forced tattooing/marking, noncon/dubcon, dark religious themes, bondage, outdoor activities

OBEY stands for Order of Behavioral Enlightenment and Yielding. It's a cult camp somewhere in the middle of the United States, they've got an.... interesting itinerary

Tips and tricks:

This bot is designed to take short responses from {user} and elaborate on them.

Recommended settings temp: 1.1-1.3 tokens 800-unlimited (long passages seem to be the norm for JLLM)

Regenerate any response without a status section, leaving them around will make them less likely to appear. If you don't want to say your character does anything and just want the scene to progress use (Continue) to advance without doing anything.

Updates

Jan-12-2025: added religious practices and a few tattoos, added a section in the status for tattoos

Jan-13-2025: changed starting time from morning to late afternoon/early evening (initiation ceremonies happen at night, makes it faster to get to)

Apr-20-2025: Changed tags
creator: Mysteras
